heroSubtitleComplete: Matches are shown below. Reset to run another search.
heroSubtitleInitial: 1:N search using face crops (small regions). min_score must be between 0.5 and 1.
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload photos. Each capture is added as a face crop for 1:N search.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and capture one face image
uploadSubtitle: Select one or more crop images from your device
apiRefLead: (1:N search for face crops; min_score is 0.5–1, unlike standard Face Search).
apiRefBody: Base URL https://api.verifik.co. Send one or more entries in images as raw base64 or HTTPS URLs to images (the API may fetch URLs server-side). Optionally set collection_id and max_results.
apiRefEndpointDesc: Returns ranked candidate persons in data, same general shape as /face-recognition/search.
paramImagesDesc: Face crops (base64 and/or HTTPS URLs), same subject
bulletApiClient: This demo uses searchCrops from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
bulletSignature: Responses typically include ranked matches and may include a signature block depending on environment.

0.title: Face Search (1:N)
0.description: Standard gallery search with full face images; lower min_score floor (0.2–1).

1.title: Face Search 1:N (Live)
1.description: Liveness on the probe image, then 1:N search.

2.title: Face Search 1:N (Active User)
2.description: 1:N search for active-session flows without liveness on the probe.

3.title: Verify Face (1:1)
3.description: Match probe images against a known enrolled person id.

4.title: Face Detection
4.description: Detect faces in an image to obtain crops before searching.

5.title: List All Persons
5.description: Inspect enrolled persons for your client.
